rewrites._comment: Vercel strips trailing slashes from :path* before matching, so `/api/dms/mcp/` 404s at the edge. But the FastMCP-mounted route upstream requires the trailing slash — without it APISIX returns a 307 redirect to http://dev.api.eveaix.com/mcp/ (wrong path + mixed-content). Explicit rule: client sends /api/dms/mcp (no slash, Vercel-friendly), edge proxies to /dms/mcp/ (with slash, FastMCP-friendly).
